steps.title: Notifications Tour
steps.text: The Notifications page lets you configure automated alerts — email or SMS — so your team is informed of critical events in real time without needing to monitor the screen constantly.

steps.title: Personal Notification Toggle
steps.text: Before configuring notifications here, note that you can globally enable or disable notifications for your own profile via the person icon → Preferences in the top-right corner of the BCMS app (see The Top Bar chapter).

steps.title: Creating a Notification
steps.text:
Click the Add button (top-left of the log table) to create a new notification rule, or the Edit icon at the end of an existing row to modify one.

Tab 1: enter a description and the destination email addresses / phone numbers. Click Next.
Tab 2: choose which events trigger this notification and the active time window (e.g. 9 AM–5 PM or 24/7).
Click Save to confirm.

steps.title: Notifications Tour Complete ✓
steps.text: Your team will now receive automated alerts for the events that matter. Continue to Statistics → Detection to explore trend analysis and reports.
